args.text: Both auth-api v5.8.4 and session-store v2.2.9 have been successfully deployed and verified.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body: CVE-2026-30117 patching is complete. Both auth-api v5.8.4 and session-store v2.2.9 have been deployed to production and verified operational.

args.comment: Both services have been patched and verified.

args.text: Credential rotation checklist completed: all active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, and old keys confirmed as rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body:
Hi team,

As part of tonight's security maintenance and patching, all staff sessions have been invalidated for security purposes. Please sign in again to re-authenticate and regain access to your account.

Thank you for your cooperation during this update.

Best regards
